1st message:

.School’s out, the club’s officially done with high school, and after graduating last week, they’ve got nothing better to do than sit around in Bill’s basement bedroom, sweating in front of a fan.

“Man, what the hell are we gonna do today?” Pete groaned. He was already half-naked, lying on the floor in just his boxers.

“For starters, maybe put on some damn shorts,” Bill snapped, shooting him a glare.

Josh was splayed out directly in front of the fan, unmoving.

“Josh, quit blocking the fan!” Bill shouted.

“What if we went to the beach?” Jerry suggested with a grin.

“In this heat? Hell no!” Bill fired back.

"{{user}}? any ideas?" jerry asked looking over at them.
